sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi provode duge sate ispred ekrana svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Many people spend long hours in front of screens every day.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُونَ أَخْبَارَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ عَبْرَ تَطْبِيقَاتِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Prate vijesti svojih prijatelja putem aplikacija društvenih mreža.
sentences.translationEn: They follow their friends' news through social media applications.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ الْأَطِبَّاءَ يَنْصَحُونَ بِتَقْلِيلِ هَذَا الْوَقْتِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali ljekari savjetuju smanjenje tog vremena radi očuvanja zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: However, doctors advise reducing this time to maintain health.
